channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: Record-breaking Ecclestone helps England dismiss India for 285 at Lord's
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Sophie Ecclestone became England Women's leading wicket-taker across all formats as the hosts dismissed India for 285 on a see-saw opening day of the historic first women's Test at Lord's.

item.title: Mané Has Not Retired From International Football —French Sports Publication L’Équipe
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: French sports newspaper L’Équipe has reported that Sadio Mané has not retired from international football. The French sports outlet said that a fake statement circulating on social media announced the Senegal star’s retirement, suggesting that the rumor originated from an AI-generated letter that wa

item.title: Oyo abduction: Eight kidnappers arrested, others killed — Presidency
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Presidency has disclosed that eight suspected kidnappers involved in the abduction of pupils and teachers in Orire Local Government Area of Oyo State have been arrested, while... The post Oyo abduction: Eight kidnappers arrested, others killed — Presidency appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: UK police arrest man suspected of murdering former MP Ann Widdecombe
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Reform UK politician Widdecombe, 78, was found dead at her home on Thursday with serious injuries.

item.title: Peru’s President-elect Fujimori says she wants to restore ties with Mexico
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Keiko Fujimori has 'every intention' of ending months-long rift with Mexico over its political asylum decisions.

item.title: JUST IN: APC retains Shettima as Tinubu’s running mate ahead of 2027 election
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: The formal unveiling effectively dispels months of speculation that President Tinubu could replace Mr Shettima with a Northern Christian in response to concerns surrounding the party’s Muslim-Muslim ticket. The post JUST IN: APC retains Shettima as Tinubu’s running mate ahead of 2027 election appear

item.description: According to him, eight of the kidnappers have been arrested and are now in the custody of the Department of State Services. The post Oyo Abduction: Eight kidnappers arrested, some killed — Presidency appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Burnley appoint Hayen as new head coach
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Burnley appoint Genk boss Nicky Hayen as their new head coach on a three-year deal.

item.title: Should you lock in a 4% CD rate now? Here’s how to decide on the next move for your cash.
item.dc:creator: MarketWatch
item.description: CD rates are at a standstill, but that could change after the next Fed meeting, or the one after that.

item.description: “Those who have done it were not supposed to have done it." The post Police speak on release of kidnapped Oyo pupils, teachers appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.description: The Federal Government has facilitated the evacuation of an additional 39 Nigerian nationals from South Africa as part of its ongoing emergency... The post FG evacuates additional 39 Nigerians from South Africa appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.description: The directive is part of a standing operational order entitled “Headquarters Standing Operational Order No. 178/2026” issued by the Commander of the Enugu State Forest Guard, Dr Akinbayo Olasoji, on Friday. item.title: BREAKING: Presidency announces rescue of kidnapped Oyo pupils, teachers

item.description: The Presidency has announced the rescue of all the pupils and teachers who were kidnapped in Orire Local Government Area of Oyo State. The post BREAKING: Presidency announces rescue of kidnapped Oyo pupils, teachers appeared first on Nairametrics.

item.description: The Special Adviser to the President on Information and Strategy, Bayo Onanuga, has disclosed that eight suspected kidnappers linked to the abduction of pupils and teachers in Orire Local Government Area of Oyo State were arrested during the rescue operation, while some others were killed. Onanuga m

item.title: Kidnapped Oyo Pupils, Teachers Regain Freedom
item.dc:creator: Information Nigeria
item.description: The pupils and teachers abducted in Orire Local Government Area of Oyo State have regained their freedom. The development was disclosed on Friday by the Special Adviser to the President on Information and Strategy, Bayo Onanuga. In a shared post on his verified X handle, Onanuga simply announced tha

item.title: Oyo abduction: Eight kidnappers in DSS custody, others neutralised – Presidency
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The presidency has revealed that some of the kidnappers who abducted pupils and teachers from schools in Orire, Oyo State, were neutralised by security operatives. DAILY POST earlier reported that the victims were rescued on Friday after spending 56 days in captivity. Confirming the development, Pre

item.title: Abia Distributes Free Farm Inputs To 18,634 Verified Farmers
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: Abia State Governor, Dr Alex Otti has reaffirmed his administration’s resolve to move agriculture beyond subsistence farming to commercial production capable of driving economic growth and guaranteeing food security. The Governor stated this on Friday at Umuahia Township stadium, during the fl

item.title: Soludo seeks restructuring, backs state police, judicial reforms
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: “More responsibilities have been transferred to states without a corresponding review of the revenue allocation formula,” the Anambra governor said. The post Soludo seeks restructuring, backs state police, judicial reforms appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Ask HN: What was the last task where only a frontier model could do it?
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: ive been seeing a recurring claim that open (weight) models 6 months behind the frontier are good enough for the majority of ‘work’. if you've had a concrete task in the last month where GLM/DeepSeek/Kimi/Qwen failed and Opus/Fable/GPT succeeded (or vice versa!), please shareIll provide a template a

item.title: Hospital workers wounded in Israeli drone attack on Gaza’s Kamal Adwan
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Palestinian Health Ministry denounces attack as part of Israel's 'systematic targeting of health facilities'.

item.title: Super Eagles slip behind Egypt in latest FIFA rankings
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The Pharaohs of Egypt have moved ahead of the Super Eagles in the latest FIFA World Rankings, DAILY POST reports. Hossam Hassan’s side’s remarkable performances at the ongoing 2026 FIFA World Cup propelled them above the Super Eagles in the men’s rankings. Before the start of the g

item.title: Bolt from the Blue too good for Precise at Newmarket
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Blue Bolt remained unbeaten this season when following up her Royal Ascot triumph with a brilliant display to down Precise in the Tattersalls Sceptre Sessions Falmouth Stakes at Newmarket.

item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Federal Government has reaffirmed its commitment to reducing Nigeria's cancer burden by at least 30 per cent by 2030, while calling for stronger... The post FG targets 30% reduction in cancer burden by 2030 appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: N822m Fraud: Court Jails Man, Orders Full Restitution To Victim
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: A Lagos State Special Offences Court sitting in Ikeja has sentenced Minnis Uchenna Howard to two years and four months imprisonment for fraud involving N822.4 million and ordered him and his company, Howard Minnis Asset Management Limited, to refund the full amount to the victim, Krystal Lubes Limit

item.title: Ronaldo still has Portugal future if he wants it, says new coach Jesus
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The 2026 World Cup exit for Portugal was believed to be the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's international career.

item.title: BREAKING: Kidnapped Oyo Pupils, Teachers Regain Freedom After 56 Days
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: The pupils, teachers and others abducted from three schools in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State have regained their freedom after spending 56 days in captivity. Presidential spokesperson, Bayo Onanuga, confirmed their release on Friday in a post on X. He wrote: “One of the rescued tea

item.title: Breaking: Abducted Oyo teachers, pupils regain freedom
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “Finally, all the kidnapped pupils and teachers in Orire, Oyo have been rescued by our security agencies,” Onanuga wrote.

item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The U.S. Trade and Development Agency has announced support for a new liquefied natural gas project in Nigeria aimed at expanding reliable energy access to industries and underserved communities in the country’s northern region. item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Will we see a fairytale of New York as new British No 1 Arthur Fery heads to the US Open? Live on Sky Sports from August 30 to September 13.

item.title: Nigeria’s Money Market Funds Hit N5.97trn As Investor Demand For Safe Returns Rises
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Nigeria’s money market fund segment grew to a net asset value of N5.97 trillion as of June 26, 2026, up 2.26 per cent from N5.84 trillion in May. A money market fund is a type of low-risk mutual fund that pools money from various investors to invest in short-term, highly liquid debt securities such

item.title: FIFA has nearly 1,200 tickets still on sale for World Cup final at $7,380
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Several tickets remain for lower decks ranging from $19,995 to $32,970, as well as Trophy Lounge section at $34,500.

item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Brazil forward Vinicius Junior has apologised to fans following the Seleção’s shock exit from the 2026 FIFA World Cup, admitting the disappointment of crashing out in the round of 16 is “hard to explain.” The Real Madrid star broke his silence in a statement released almost four da

item.description: A Lagos State Special Offences Court sitting in Ikeja has convicted and sentenced Minnis Uchenna Howard and his company, Howard Minnis Asset Management Limited, over the fraudulent conversion of N822,422,260 meant for the purchase of base oil. The conviction followed the successful prosecution of th

item.title: Police Rescue Four Kidnap Victims in Abuja
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Federal Capital Territory (FCT) Police Command has rescued four residents abducted during a kidnapping attack in the Yellow House area of Mpape, Abuja, after engaging suspected kidnappers in a gun battle at the Jikoko Hills. The command, however, confirmed that one resident was killed during the

item.title: Cooking Gas Supply Tightening Looms Amid Resumed Middle East Hostilities

With hostility resumption by U.S and Iran is likely to create fresh bottlenecks. Although supply has impro

item.title: Nasdaq Says SK Hynix Bonanza Opens Path to More Foreign Listings
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: Nasdaq Inc. President Nelson Griggs said SK Hynix Inc.’s blockbuster listing is spurring other international companies to consider the US for either initial public offerings or the sales of American depositary receipts.

item.title: BHP Explores Sale of Chilean Desalination Plant, Power Lines
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg Markets
item.description: BHP Group is exploring the sale of a desalination plant in Chile, along with its electricity transmission assets, extending a strategy of monetizing infrastructure as the world’s biggest miner concentrates capital on its core copper business, according to people familiar with the matter.

item.description: As the AI boom boosts demand for RAM, SK Hynix - one of the world's biggest suppliers of memory chips - launched on Wall Street Friday. The South Korean chipmaker opened at $170 per share and raised $26.5 billion, surpassing Alibaba's record as the largest debut of a foreign company, according to re

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Barcelona have agreed a deal to sign a deal to sign Karim Adeyemi from Borussia Dortmund. The LaLiga champions will pay an initial €22m plus €7m add-ons based on achievements. Barca manager, Hansi Flick, is believed to have instructed the club to get Adeyemi, who was in the final year of his contact

item.title: England's Woad storms into Evian Championship lead as Korda misses cut
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England's Lottie Woad shot a seven-under-par 64 to claim the halfway lead at the Amundi Evian Championship as she seeks her first major victory.

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Nigeria Democratic Congress, NDC, presidential candidate, Peter Obi, has mourned the death of Catholic Archbishop of Benin, Augustine Akubeze. The rev

item.title: Hacking worry for Argentine FA over World Cup emails
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Argentina's football association signals it may have suffered a cyber attack after emails from its accounts reportedly criticised refereeing in the dramatic win against Egypt at the World Cup.

item.title: BREAKING: Kidnapped Oyo pupils, teachers regain freedom from bandits’ captivity
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The kidnapped pupils and teachers from Orire, Oyo State, have been freed by their abductors. The development comes after more than 50 days in captivity. Their release was announced in a post on X on Friday by Bayo Onanuga, spokesman for the presidency. “Finally, the kidnapped pupils

item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The All Progressives Congress (APC), has retained Vice President Kashim Shettima as President Bola Tinubu’s running mate for the 2027 presidential election. APC unveil Shettima in Abuja on Friday, ending months of speculations as to whether the ruling party and/or Tinubu would alter the

item.description: Spain winger, Lamine Yamal, has identified Portugal’s Cristiano Ronaldo as the player that has “aura”. item.description: Barely two months after bandits struck Oriire local government in Oyo State, the pupils and teachers abducted have regained their freedom. The post BREAKING: Kidnapped Oriire pupils, teachers regain freedom appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Mali Under Siege: July 4 Attacks Expose Cracks in AES Security
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: On July 4, 2026, Mali woke to a wave of violence that swept across its northern towns. Jama’at Nusrat al‑Islam wal‑Muslimin, JNIM, and the Front de Libération de l’Azawad, FLA, launched a coordinated offensive that struck at the country’s defensive backbone. Ten attacks in a single day — from Anéfis

item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former British cabinet minister and Reform UK spokesperson, Ann Widdecombe, has died at the age of 78 after she was found with serious injuries at her home in Haytor, Dartmoor, prompting police to open a murder investigation. Devon and Cornwall Police said officers responded to the property on July

item.title: Russian attacks kill four as Ukraine continues to target oil infrastructure

item.description: Ukrainian official says Russia's attack on Kramatorsk kills four, including a teenager, and injures nine.

item.title: N100bn Stadium: Bayelsans Need Food, Jobs, Not Another Monument, PDP Tells Diri
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The People’s Democratic Party (PDP), Bayelsa State Chapter, has expressed shock over Governor Douye Diri’s disclosure that the ongoing stadium project at Igbogene will cost more than ₦100 billion. The party described the project as a misplaced priority in the face of widespread hardship,

item.title: Xhaka tells Swiss fans to ‘keep dreaming’ ahead of Argentina World Cup clash
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The midfielder said Switzerland's "overarching aim" was to beat the defending champions and reach the semi-finals for the first time. The post Xhaka tells Swiss fans to ‘keep dreaming’ ahead of Argentina World Cup clash appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Clinical Sinner outclasses Djokovic as he books Wimbledon final place
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Novak Djokovic's dreams of a record-equalling eighth Wimbledon title at the age of 39 were firmly snuffed out by defending champion Jannik Sinner at the semi-final stage on Friday, as the Italian won 6-4 6-4 6-4.

item.title: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

item.title: Breaking: All Kidnapped Oyo School Children, Teachers Rescued
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: rescued All the schoolchildren and teachers abducted during the May 15 attack on the Ahoro-Esiele community in Oriire Local Government Area of Oyo State have been released, THISDAY can confirm.

item.title: BREAKING: 2027: APC presents Shettima as Tinubu’s running mate
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The National Working Committee, NWC, of the All Progressives Congress, APC, has formally unveiled Vice President Kashim Shettima as President Bola Tinubu’s running mate for the 2027 presidential election. The National chairman of the APC, Nentawe Yilwatda, disclosed the this via X when he stated tha

item.title: Court Orders Forfeiture Of Lagos Socialite’s Properties Over Alleged Drug Trafficking
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Federal High Court in Lagos has ordered the final forfeiture of four properties linked to a Lagos socialite, Suleiman Aremu, popularly known as “Barryshine” and “Ejeoto,” to the federal government over alleged proceeds of drug trafficking. Justice Musa Kakaki made the ord

item.title: A new app, HyperTexting, turns the open web into a scrollable social media-like feed
item.dc:creator: TechCrunch
item.description: HyperTexting's new app aims to make the open web feel more like social media by turning websites, blogs, newsletters, and podcasts into a scrollable feed, while also making it easier to post to your own website.

item.title: Hundreds give hero’s welcome to Egypt after best World Cup run
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Supporters waved Egyptian and Palestinian flags in support of Gaza as the Pharaohs boarded an open-top bus for a parade.

item.title: Illiteracy, Poverty Major Cause Of Insecurity In Nigeria – Alia
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Benue State governor, Rev. Fr. Hyacinth Alia, has identified illiteracy, poverty as major contributing factors to the lingering insecurity in Nigeria. In a statement issued by the governor’s Chief Press Secretary, Sir Tersoo Kula, said Governor Alia made this known during the Quarterly Lecture Serie

item.title: Agric Workers Urge FG To Fast-Track Occupational Hazard Allowance Payment
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: The Nigeria Union of Agriculture and Allied Employees (NUAAE) has urged the Federal Government to immediately release the circular approving the extension of the Occupational Hazard Allowance to all eligible professionals in the agricultural sector, saying the delay is affecting workers’ moral

item.title: Governor Yusuf Urges Young Lawyers to Uphold Integrity, Courage, Service
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Kano State Governor, Abba Yusuf, has urged young lawyers to uphold integrity, courage and selfless service in the discharge of their professional responsibilities. This was contained in a statement issued by the governor’s spokesman, Sunusi Bature Dawakin Tofa. The governor made the call while

item.title: 2027: APM opens talks with senators, Reps over defections
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The announcement came as Senator Mohammed Ogoshi Onawo formally defected from the African Democratic Congress (ADC) to the APM during Senate plenary. The post 2027: APM opens talks with senators, Reps over defections appeared first on Vanguard News.
